ddls:
CREATE TABLE "acquisitions" (
  "acquisition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each acquisition */,
  "acquisition_year" INTEGER /* Year in which the acquisition was made */,
  "business_domain_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the business domain of the acquired company */,
  "parent_company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent company that made the acquisition */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Number of acquisitions in the specified year and domain */,
  "acquisition_name" TEXT /* A name or identifier for the acquisition */,
  "acquisition_date" TEXT /* The exact date of the acquisition */,
  "acquisition_value" REAL /* Value of the acquisition in millions of dollars */,
  "acquisition_currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the acquisition value is denominated */,
  "revenue_impact" REAL /* Estimated impact on the parent company's revenue */,
  "profit_impact" REAL /* Estimated impact on the parent company's profit */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the acquisition (e.g., 'Completed', 'Pending', 'Failed') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("acquisition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_acquisitions_parent_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_company_id") REFERENCES parent_companies ("parent_company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_acquisitions_business_domain_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_domain_id") REFERENCES business_domains ("business_domain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parent_companies" (
  "parent_company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parent company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the parent company */,
  "company_description" TEXT /* Description of the parent company */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO of the company */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the parent company was founded */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Primary industry the parent company operates in */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the parent company */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the parent company's official website */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the parent company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parent_company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_domains" (
  "business_domain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each business domain */,
  "domain_name" TEXT /* Name of the business domain */,
  "domain_description" TEXT /* Description of the business domain */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Primary industry associated with the business domain */,
  "sub_domain" TEXT /* Sub-domain or sub-category within the business domain */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("business_domain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "acquired_companies" (
  "acquired_company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each acquired company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the acquired company */,
  "company_description" TEXT /* Description of the acquired company */,
  "acquisition_date" TEXT /* Date of acquisition */,
  "acquisition_value" REAL /* Value of the acquisition in millions of dollars */,
  "business_domain_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the business domain of the acquired company */,
  "parent_company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent company that made the acquisition */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the acquired company was founded */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Primary industry the acquired company operates in */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Annual revenue of the acquired company before acquisition */,
  "profit" REAL /* Annual profit of the acquired company before acquisition */,
  "employee_count" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the acquired company */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the acquired company's official website */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the acquired company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("acquired_company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_acquired_companies_business_domain_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_domain_id") REFERENCES business_domains ("business_domain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_acquired_companies_parent_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_company_id") REFERENCES parent_companies ("parent_company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "acquisition_financials" (
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial record */,
  "acquisition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the acquisition */,
  "acquisition_value" REAL /* Value of the acquisition in millions of dollars */,
  "acquisition_currency" TEXT /* Currency of the acquisition value */,
  "revenue_impact" REAL /* Estimated impact on the parent company's revenue */,
  "profit_impact" REAL /* Estimated impact on the parent company's profit */,
  "revenue_impact_percentage" REAL /* Estimated percentage impact on the parent company's revenue */,
  "profit_impact_percentage" REAL /* Estimated percentage impact on the parent company's profit */,
  "cash_payment" REAL /* Cash payment made for the acquisition */,
  "equity_payment" REAL /* Equity payment made for the acquisition */,
  "debt_payment" REAL /* Debt payment made for the acquisition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_acquisition_financials_acquisition_id FOREIGN KEY ("acquisition_id") REFERENCES acquisitions ("acquisition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, investor, executive) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access the user has (e.g., 'read', 'write', 'admin') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "acquisition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the acquisition being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_acquisition_id FOREIGN KEY ("acquisition_id") REFERENCES acquisitions ("acquisition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "historical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "acquisition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the acquisition */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the historical data */,
  "business_domain_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the business domain */,
  "parent_company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent company */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Number of acquisitions in the specified year and domain */,
  "acquisition_value" REAL /* Value of the acquisition in millions of dollars */,
  "acquisition_currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the acquisition value is denominated */,
  "revenue_impact" REAL /* Estimated impact on the parent company's revenue */,
  "profit_impact" REAL /* Estimated impact on the parent company's profit */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the acquisition (e.g., 'Completed', 'Pending', 'Failed') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_parent_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_company_id") REFERENCES parent_companies ("parent_company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_business_domain_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_domain_id") REFERENCES business_domains ("business_domain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_acquisition_id FOREIGN KEY ("acquisition_id") REFERENCES acquisitions ("acquisition_id")
)
